_meta.name: Sporeus — User Funnel
_meta.description: Conversion funnel: signups → first session → Strava connected → first AI insight → tier upgrade.
_meta.import_instructions: Axiom → Dashboards → New → Import JSON → paste this file

charts.title: New signups per day (last 30d)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "signup_completed" | summarize signups = count() by bin(_time, 1d) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Strava connect events per day
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "strava-oauth" | where status == "ok" | summarize connections = count() by bin(_time, 1d) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: First AI insight per day (analyse-session success)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "analyse-session" | where status == "ok" | summarize insights = count() by bin(_time, 1d) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Tier upgrade events (dodo-webhook + generate-report success)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn in ("dodo-webhook", "generate-report") | where status == "ok" | summarize upgrades = count() by bin(_time, 1d), fn | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Funnel step counts (client_events via ingest-telemetry)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "ingest-telemetry" | where status == "ok" | summarize events = count() by bin(_time, 1d)

charts.title: Funnel events by step (last 7d)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "funnel" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 1d)

charts.title: Strava activity backfill completions per day
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "strava-backfill-worker" | where status == "ok" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 1d)

charts.title: Active sessions logged today (training_log proxy)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn in ("analyse-session", "parse-activity", "strava-backfill-worker") | where _time >= startofday(now()) | where status == "ok" | summarize count()
